/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -Wl,--gc-sections -T/workspace/OmniBoot/target/stm32f446re/linker/bootloader.ld -Wl,-Map=/workspace/OmniBoot/build/OmniBoot.map CMakeFiles/OmniBoot.elf.dir/core/src/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/OmniBoot.elf.dir/core/src/ymodem.c.obj CMakeFiles/OmniBoot.elf.dir/target/stm32f446re/bsp/src/crc.c.obj CMakeFiles/OmniBoot.elf.dir/target/stm32f446re/bsp/src/flash.c.obj CMakeFiles/OmniBoot.elf.dir/target/stm32f446re/bsp/src/gpio.c.obj CMakeFiles/OmniBoot.elf.dir/target/stm32f446re/bsp/src/rcc.c.obj CMakeFiles/OmniBoot.elf.dir/target/stm32f446re/bsp/src/startup_stm32.c.obj CMakeFiles/OmniBoot.elf.dir/target/stm32f446re/bsp/src/systick.c.obj CMakeFiles/OmniBoot.elf.dir/target/stm32f446re/bsp/src/uart.c.obj -o OmniBoot.elf
